class.name: HealthComponent
class.brief_description: A component node that manages health logic, limits, and passive regeneration for game entities.
class.description: The [HealthComponent] is a modular [Node] written in C++ (GDExtension) designed to handle health tracking, healing, and passive regeneration. It maintains internal boundaries for health points using standard mathematical clamping to prevent bugs like negative health or exceeding maximum limits. Can be attached to any game entity (e.g., players, enemies, or destructible objects) to instantly give them health capabilities.

method.name: add_health
method.description: Adds the specified [param p_health] amount to [member current_health]. The resulting value is automatically clamped and the method returns the final updated health.

method.name: change_health
method.description: Simultaneously changes [member max_health] and handles [member current_health] scaling. Useful for RPG level-up mechanics.

method.name: get_health
method.description: Returns the current health points of the entity.

method.name: get_max_health
method.description: Returns the maximum health capacity of the entity.

method.name: get_regen_amount
method.description: Returns the current amount of health restored per regeneration tick.

method.name: get_regen_interval
method.description: Returns the current time interval between regeneration ticks.

method.name: set_health
method.description: Directly sets the [member current_health] to [param new_health]. The value is safely clamped between [code]0.0[/code] and [member max_health].

method.name: set_max_health
method.description: Sets the maximum health capacity ([member max_health]). Automatically clamps [member current_health] if the new maximum is lower than the current health value.

method.name: set_regen_amount
method.description: Sets the amount of health restored per regeneration tick.

method.name: set_regen_interval
method.description: Sets the time interval between regeneration ticks.

method.name: set_regeneration
method.description: A convenience method to configure both regeneration amount and interval in a single call. [b]Note:[/b] To completely disable passive regeneration, set either [param p_amount] or [param p_interval] to [code]0.0[/code] (or a negative value).

members.member: The current health points of the entity. Modifying this property automatically clamps the value between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]max_health[/code].
The maximum health capacity of the entity. Changing this value ensures [member current_health] never exceeds the new boundary.
The amount of health points recovered on each regeneration tick. Setting this to [code]0.0[/code] disables passive regeneration.
The time interval (in seconds) between each regeneration tick. Setting this to [code]0.0[/code] disables passive regeneration.
